details: The agent executed all necessary GitHub API calls (get PR details, get_check_runs, get_comments, get_reviews) and produced a complete, accurate answer. Title matches the known fact ('Gateway: harden OpenResponses file-context escaping'), author matches (joshavant), CI results were correctly tabulated from the returned data (19 success, 7 skipped, 4 failures out of 30 of 41 checks shown), and the single Greptile bot comment was accurately summarized. The agent noted no human review comments were submitted (reviews returned empty). All data was sourced from actual tool calls, not hallucinated.
